title: Penguin Home Stockpot Lid - 24cm Toughened Glass with Stainless Steel Knob, Universal Fit for Stockpots and Cookware
features: Perfect 24cm Fit: Designed to fit 24cm stockpots, making it the ideal replacement or upgrade for your cookware.
Toughened Glass for Durability: High-quality toughened glass ensures long-lasting performance and excellent heat resistance for everyday use.
Stylish Stainless Steel Knob: Ergonomic stainless steel knob offers a comfortable grip and adds a touch of modern elegance to your cookware.
Monitor Cooking with Ease: Transparent glass lets you observe your food without lifting the lid, maintaining heat and moisture.
Versatile and Heat-Resistant: Suitable for simmering, boiling, and other cooking tasks, withstanding high temperatures without warping or cracking.
description: Upgrade your cookware with the Penguin Home 24cm Stockpot Lid, designed for durability and style. Crafted with toughened glass for excellent heat resistance, this lid ensures safe and effective cooking while allowing you to monitor your food. The stainless steel knob adds a sleek touch and stays cool for safe handling. Perfectly compatible with 24cm stockpots, this universal lid combines functionality and aesthetics to meet all your kitchen needs. A reliable choice for replacing or upgrading your stockpot lids!
